assertions.title: Onboarding validates required fields before submit

steps.action: Open /login as a signed-out user and create a brand-new disposable account.
steps.expected: Successful sign-up should land the fresh session on /onboarding.
steps.observed: The disposable account sign-up completed through POST /api/auth/sign-up/email and the browser landed on http://dashboard.faworra.localhost:1355/onboarding.

steps.action: Open the Country selector and search for an arbitrary raw value (ZZZINVALID).
steps.expected: The selector should return no selectable result and preserve the default country selection.
steps.observed: The selector rendered 'No country found.' while the country combobox still showed Ghana as the selected value.

steps.action: Open the Base currency selector and search for an arbitrary raw value (ZZZINVALID).
steps.expected: The selector should return no selectable result and preserve the default currency selection.
steps.observed: The selector rendered 'No currency found.' while the base-currency combobox still showed GHS as the selected value.

steps.action: Enter a one-character company name ('a'), blur the field, and attempt submission from the invalid form state.
steps.expected: Client-side validation should block onboarding completion and provide field-level invalid feedback.
steps.observed: The form showed inline text 'Company name must be at least 2 characters', the Create fashion workspace button became disabled, pressing Enter from the field kept the session on /onboarding, and no onboarding.complete network entry appeared.

steps.action: Inspect invalid-state semantics on the company-name control after the blur/submit attempt.
steps.expected: The field should expose programmatic invalid semantics tied to the rendered error message.
steps.observed: The input had id='companyName', aria-invalid='true', and aria-describedby='companyName-error', which resolved to the visible error text 'Company name must be at least 2 characters'.

evidence.network: Resource timing recorded http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/api/auth/sign-up/email and the onboarding document fetch, but after the invalid company-name blur and Enter submit attempt there was no onboarding.complete request entry; the browser stayed on /onboarding with the submit button disabled.
evidence.fieldSemantics: input#companyName exposed aria-invalid="true" and aria-describedby="companyName-error"; the associated element #companyName-error rendered 'Company name must be at least 2 characters'.

frictions.description: agent-browser's network request log returned no entries in this session even after the real sign-up and onboarding interactions.
frictions.resolution: Used the browser Performance resource entries, final URL, disabled submit state, and captured screenshots/ARIA attributes as corroborating network and validation evidence.

summary: Rechecked VAL-ONBOARD-002 after the company-name inline validation fix. The selector-driven country and currency controls rejected arbitrary raw search values while preserving Ghana/GHS, invalid company-name input was blocked client-side with no onboarding completion request, and the company field now shows Midday-style inline error feedback with aria-invalid and aria-describedby semantics tied to the rendered message.
